response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software engineering and AI-agent infrastructure, including work with MCP frameworks and agentic workflows, which aligns well with the role's GenAI focus. However, his resume lacks clear evidence of building production-grade AI systems, vector databases, or RAG architectures. His background in TypeScript and cloud platforms (AWS) is strong, but GenAI-specific expertise is limited.
strengths: Proven full-stack engineering expertise with TypeScript and cloud platforms (AWS)
Experience contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks
Strong technical leadership and open-source contributions
concerns: Limited direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures
No explicit mention of LLM performance metrics or optimization techniques
Resume lacks GenAI-specific production-grade AI system examples
